entity.summary: Decentralized exchange candidate identified in the HEI verified-unadded backlog from CoinPaprika and CoinGecko source data and currently treated as an active DEX record.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded backlog rows hei_unadded_0018 and hei_unadded_0019. Source evidence is limited to CoinPaprika and CoinGecko database references, so this record should be improved later if stronger official-history evidence is found. File slug is normalized as nine-inch while preserving 9inch as canonical_name.

events.title: 9inch present in exchange source data
events.description: 9inch appeared in the verified-unadded candidate generator from CoinPaprika and CoinGecko source data as an exchange-like DEX candidate not found in current HEI records.
events.notes: This is a database-reference event, not a verified launch event. Replace with a proper launch/history event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchanges reference for 9inch
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0018, identifying 9inch as an exchange-like source candidate.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchanges reference for 9inch
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0019, with domain app.9inch.io and source id 9inch.
